assertions.title: Chinese Text Rendering
assertions.reason: Chinese glyphs render as tofu boxes on the homepage mixed-language paragraph.

steps.action: Open homepage at 1280x800 and inspect Chinese text block
steps.expected: Chinese characters render correctly with no tofu
steps.observed: Chinese segment in the sentence appears as square tofu boxes

steps.action: Inspect computed typography on the same paragraph
steps.observed: Font stack includes CJK fallbacks, but rendered output still shows tofu

computedStyles.text: 欢迎来到我的个人技术博客。这里分享 Web 开发和软件工程的文章。
computedStyles.fontFamily: Inter, "SF Pro Display", "SF Pro Text", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Noto Sans CJK SC", "Noto Sans SC", "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "WenQuanYi Micro Hei", "Droid Sans Fallback", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif

assertions.issues: Fails assertion: visible tofu boxes indicate Chinese glyph rendering is broken.

assertions.title: Mixed Chinese and English Typography
assertions.reason: Mixed Chinese/English sentence has tofu boxes for Chinese text, so bilingual rendering is not graceful.

steps.action: Inspect mixed Chinese/English sentence on homepage at 1280x800
steps.expected: Mixed text renders naturally with no overlap and correct glyphs
steps.observed: Line-height/spacing are stable, but Chinese glyphs render as tofu boxes

steps.action: Confirm bilingual content and computed line-height
steps.expected: Contains both scripts and maintains readable typography
steps.observed: Sentence contains both Chinese and English; lineHeight is 28.8px for 16px text

computedStyles.text: 欢迎来到我的个人技术博客。这里分享 Web 开发和软件工程的文章。

assertions.issues: Fails assertion because mixed-script paragraph still shows tofu for Chinese characters.

assertions.title: No Horizontal Overflow
assertions.reason: At all required viewports, scrollWidth equals clientWidth with no horizontal overflow.

steps.action: Set viewport to 375x667 and measure document/body widths
Set viewport to 768x800 and measure document/body widths
Set viewport to 1024x800 and measure document/body widths
Set viewport to 1280x800 and measure document/body widths

frictions.description: agent-browser network request list was empty until a wildcard network route was attached for request capture.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser network route "**/*"` before reloading the page.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-FOUND-027), 2 failed (VAL-FOUND-021, VAL-FOUND-023) due to tofu rendering of Chinese text.
